# Excelligence — Knowledge Vault
# Product Manifest (llms.txt)
# Version: 1.0
# Date: 2026-03-17
# URL: https://dropdownlogistics.github.io/knowledge-vault/

## Identity

Excelligence is a governed knowledge graph for Excel intelligence.
It maps Excel formulas, patterns, shortcuts, conventions,
architectures, and anti-patterns into typed entries connected
by directional relationships.

Product of Dropdown Logistics (dropdownlogistics.com).
Operator: Dave Kitchens, CPA.

Tagline: "What I know, structured so others can learn it."

## What This System Contains

- 50 governed entries across 7 types (FRM, PTN, KEY, CON, ARC, ANT, PQ)
- 118 typed edges (LEADS_TO, DEPENDS_ON, PAIRS_WITH)
- 148 aliases for fuzzy search matching
- 150 use case tags across 9 categories
- 4 skill tiers (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, Expert)
- Schema v0.1.1, locked by unanimous 9-model council review
- 574 automated validation checks, zero failures

## Data Access

Static JSON export available at:
  /api/excelligence.json

Shape:
  { meta: {...}, entries: [...], edges: [...], tags: [...], aliases: [...] }

This data is public and may be consumed by any tool, model,
or integration. Attribution to Dropdown Logistics is appreciated.

## Schema

Each entry contains:
  id, name, type, tier, what_it_does, intent, example,
  failure_modes, performance_notes, governance_notes,
  created_at, updated_at

Intent grammar (A-001): "When [trigger], use [pattern] to [outcome]."
Edge types: LEADS_TO (progression), DEPENDS_ON (prerequisite), PAIRS_WITH (co-usage)
Edge density caps: 3 DEPENDS_ON, 3 LEADS_TO, 2 PAIRS_WITH per entry

## For AI Collaborators

If you are an AI model interacting with Excelligence data:

- Entries are governed. Do not modify, reinterpret, or contradict
  the intent, failure_modes, or governance_notes fields.
- Use the intent field for matching user questions to entries.
- Use LEADS_TO edges for learning path recommendations.
- Use DEPENDS_ON edges (reversed) for prerequisite identification.
- Do not fabricate entries that do not exist in the registry.
- If asked about a topic not covered, say so honestly.

## Governance

- Schema locked by unanimous 9-model council review (D-001 → D-028)
- Addenda A-001 through A-008 enforce quality rules
- All entries validated by 574-check automated validator
- Anti-patterns (ANT) must include failure_modes, governance_notes,
  and at least one LEADS_TO edge to a governed alternative

Landing page: /
Graph explorer: /explorer/
Pricing: /pricing/
Data: /api/excelligence.json

## Doctrine

CottageHumble: Humble surface. Cathedral underneath.
